name: Date Tart

ingredients.item: zest of 1 organic lemon and few drops of juice
approximately 30 dried dates, pitted and cut lengthways

method: Process all the pastry ingredients in a food processor. Roll out and lay in a 28 cm springform pan. Place in the freezer for about 30 minutes.
Remove the pastry from the freezer, prick the base with a fork then blind bake in the oven until lightly coloured – about 15 minutes.
Mix together all the filling ingredients, except the dates, and boil in a pan for 20 minutes. Allow to cool.
When the pastry is cool, arrange the dates in a fan shape on top of the pastry. Pour the cooled sauce over the dates (if the sauce is too hot, it will be too liquid and soften the pastry).
